question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/config/MonitorConfiguration.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: subscribe()] Can an unprivileged external user cause the .doFinally(s -> log.warn('Stopped subscribe after {} signal', s)) callback to be triggered by inducing a cancellation or error signal on the subscribe Disposable, permanently stopping the subscriber without automatic restart, causing the monitor to lose all visibility into transaction confirmation status?
